ab: ya na ikapito no toki am ko mangay do gako.
en: I arrived at school at seven today.

ab: ya mapakzikzing am, ya somdep do pivatvatekan o sinsi namen, maniring o nipamnekan namen a panirsiringen am “tomanek! amlogod.”
ch: 上課鐘響，老師走進教室，班長說:「起立!敬禮!」
en: It’s time for class , the teacher walked into the classroom, and the monitor said: “Stand up! Salute!”

ab: “kamina kong” koan namen a ya mazizigton.
ch: 我們很有精神的說:「老師好。」

ab: macinanao namen am, nanaoen na yamen no sinsi do ipivilavilang no Tao.
ch: 上課的時候，老師教我們數字的族語。
en: In class, the teacher taught us the Yami language of numbers.

ab: namen to macilolo do sinsi a mivilang, namen nianood paa o anood no vilavilang.
ch: 我們跟著老師唸，我們唱了數字歌。
en: We followed the teacher to read, we sang the number song.

ab: ya aro o ko katengengan rana ciriciring no Tao.
en: I have learned many Yami languages.

ab: ko mangday so araraw a mangay do gako, ko mangday so araraw a macinanao do ciriciring no Tao, ta ipamizing ko jira ama a ka ni ina.
ch: 我天天上學，我天天學族語，我要講給爸爸媽媽聽。
en: I go to school every day, I learn the Yami language every day, and I want to tell my mother.
